title: Cross-milestone integration E2E — RAG → NLU → agentic → planner → copilot
predecessor: M35-T1 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit b68d09b — performance defaults + clamp audit; all 10 defaults HELD on llama3.1:8b evidence; +4 unit tests 1130 → 1134; 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean). M35-T0 shipped 2026-04-19 (commit da4ce1f — plan doc). M34 COMPLETE shipped 2026-04-18 (commits f1180cf + 893f8fd + af643ec).
goal: Author apps/desktop/e2e/phase-5-integration.spec.ts — a single Playwright spec stitching the full Phase 5 stack (M28 → M29 → M30 → M31 → M32 → M33 → M34) in one session. Scenario per M35 plan doc §4.1: (1) vault.addFile → M28 on-write chunker+embedder fires; (2) Cmd+K 'summarise the uploaded vault file' → M30 NLU + M31 agentic loop with M29 RAG retrieval resolves → answer cites the file; (3) Cmd+K 'decompose the Q1 roadmap into tickets' → M32 amber write-side gate → Confirm → decompose_project + delegate_subtask; (4) copilot.configure manual tick → M33 analyzer proposes insight; (5) Cmd+Shift+K sidebar opens → insight card visible → dismiss → ask-input fires M33 ask-the-copilot path via M34 sidebar. Runtime budget ≤15s. Uses the four-member canned-seam quartet (test-classifier + test-agentic-provider + test-agentic-tools + test-copilot-provider). Zero production code changes — purely additive test.
acceptance: New apps/desktop/e2e/phase-5-integration.spec.ts — ≤15s runtime, asserts every transition via stable data-* selectors (data-step-kind + data-copilot-insight-id + data-copilot-sidebar-root + data-copilot-toolbar-toggle + data-copilot-widget-list).

Cross-milestone scenario exercises M28/M29 vault index + retrieval, M30 Cmd+K palette, M31 agentic step log + final answer, M32 amber write-side gate + decompose + delegate, M33 copilot.configure manual tick + copilot.insights, M34 Cmd+Shift+K sidebar + ask input.

Four-member canned-seam quartet wired: test-classifier (M30), test-agentic-provider + test-agentic-tools (M31/M32), test-copilot-provider (M33). Any new prompt keys added to the seam tables in lockstep (T8 pattern from M30/M31/M32/M33).
Regression guards (invariant #11 + M30 T5 destructive gate + M32 T5 write-side gate + Phase 5 top-bar badge) all asserted.

Full test suite green after Electron ABI rebuild: pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 11 specs / 12 cases. pnpm test → 1134/1134 unit green (T2 adds E2E only, not unit). pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm lint 0 errors / ≤24 warnings.
Atomic commit: test(m35): M35 T2 — cross-milestone integration E2E spec.

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M35 T2 — commit ledger (<sha>) — roll orchestrator.json tasksCompleted 2 → 3, update pending.json T2 status pending → shipped, update current-task.json to point at M35-T3, prepend M35 T2 DONE subsection to .loki/CONTINUITY.md.
tests: +1 E2E spec (10 → 11 spec files; 11 → 12 Playwright cases)
carryForward: M35 T1 closed: all 10 Phase 5 settings clamps HELD at measurement-held defaults. Envelopes untouched. Measurement evidence lives in apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts header + .loki/state/orchestrator.json history.M35-T1.ollamaEvidence.

Architectural seams (canned quartet / {rows, truncated} envelope / data-* selectors / pause-aware providerRouter wrapper / AbortController stop / is_system filter-sweep / atomic + ledger cadence / ABI rebuild dance / invariant #11) unchanged.
Copilot wire contract: copilot.ask returns { runId, threadId } matching M31 complex_request — unchanged for M35.
Phase 5 badge is FROZEN at 'Phase 5' through v1.1.0 release. M35 T8 pins the literal string in a unit test. Phase 6 work is the next session after M35 T10.
ABI state at start of T2: Node (post M35 T1 vitest). Before running e2e, run `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar` to switch to Electron ABI.
